prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T3 work setting, the evaluated element is H-201 Duct installation within 2.3 HVAC-R. The relevant subcategory is 2.3.2 Distribution. The observed field condition is: unsealed joints (no mastic/foil tape - cloth duct tape is the classic wrong answer, great ID item). The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors IMC 603, SMACNA, Manual D.
title: T3 H-201 Code/spec compliance
